headline: Why Salesforce (CRM) Is Betting Agentforce and Slack Can Deepen Its AI Growth Story
summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the fastest-growing agentic AI stocks to buy. On April 1, 2026, TD Cowen reiterated a Buy rating and $250 price target after Salesforce’s Slackbot event in San Francisco, calling Slackbot a key enabling technology that could accelerate AI consumption in CRM. The caution is scale. Agentforce is growing fast, […]

headline: Goldman Sachs drops a bombshell on software stocks
summary: Software stocks just recorded the worst relative performance against the S&P 500 in the sector’s entire recorded history. headline: Salesforce Adds FinText Messaging To Deepen Ties With Regulated Clients
summary: Solutions by Text has integrated its FinText compliant messaging platform into Salesforce Marketing Cloud. The update brings secure, two way, compliance focused mobile communication into Journey Builder for regulated sectors. Organizations can manage SMS, MMS, and RCS conversations alongside email and other channels directly within Salesforce. Salesforce, listed as NYSE:CRM, is rolling out this deeper integration at a time when its share price sits at $164.96 and recent returns have been...

headline: Microsoft, Salesforce, ServiceNow Sell-Off Is Overdone: Dan Ives
summary: Dan Ives is calling the turn. With geopolitical tensions easing after Iran ceasefire developments, the Wedbush analyst sees a risk-on shift underway—and argues that tech stocks, especially Microsoft Corporation, Salesforce, Inc. and ServiceNow, Inc, are mispriced right as AI demand accelerates. AI Demand Is Hitting Now, Not Later After weeks of industry checks, Ives says the message from CIOs is clear: AI adoption is moving fast from experimentation to deployment.
